# Life Quality

> Official website of Life Quality, focused on integrative medicine, yoga, lifestyle improvement, wellness, and community health.

Website: https://lifequality.org.in/

## Main Pages

- Home: https://lifequality.org.in/
- About EQUAL Society: https://lifequality.org.in/equal-society.html
- Why Integrative Medicine: https://lifequality.org.in/programs/IntegrativeMedicine.html
- Physician Consultation: https://lifequality.org.in/consultation.html
- Dietary Advice: https://lifequality.org.in/programs/dietary-advice.html
- Shirodhara: https://lifequality.org.in/programs/shirodhara.html
- My Buddy: https://lifequality.org.in/programs/my-buddy.html
- Singing, Kirtan and Dance: https://lifequality.org.in/programs/singing-kirtan-dance.html
- Yoga Asana Protocol: https://lifequality.org.in/Yoga/yoga-asana.html
- Pranayama: https://lifequality.org.in/Yoga/pranayama.html
- Meditation: https://lifequality.org.in/Yoga/meditation.html
- Lifestyle Counseling: https://lifequality.org.in/LifeStyle/LifeStyleCounseling.html
- Research Doctor: https://lifequality.org.in/LifeStyle/research.html
- Nature Walks: https://lifequality.org.in/LifeStyle/nature-walks.html
- Positive Thinking: https://lifequality.org.in/LifeStyle/positive-thinking.html
- Benefits of Soft Sun Rays: https://lifequality.org.in/LifeStyle/soft-sun-rays.html
- Volunteer: https://lifequality.org.in/volunteer.html
- Contact: https://lifequality.org.in/Contact.html
- Recharge Retreat: https://lifequality.org.in/airbnb.html

Topics:
- Integrative Medicine
- Yoga
- Meditation
- Healthy Lifestyle
- Wellness
